name: vorhaben
description: Track and manage your business endeavours.
author: nikoladubica

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace server & npm run dev --workspace client & wait
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace mcp
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace server && npm run lint --workspace client && npm run lint --workspace mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace client && npm run typecheck --workspace mcp
